creator: freebsd-washroom@duhanic.com
text:
So if/when this gets greenlighted (please note I've asked for becoming the maintainer) I will be looking forward to patch away the dynamic quicklisp system here.

Does this need a warning until then (quicklisp is a library maintenance system, maybe similar to CPAN and pulls a lot of stuff) or is this an absolute no-go?
Quicklisp is only used during the build time here.

Thanks for your comments!
